guestCard.subtitle: Join to save your predictions, compete, and climb the leaderboards.

footer.tagline: Make your picks for every 2026 World Cup match and climb the leaderboard against friends.
footer.disclaimer: Unofficial fan project, not affiliated with or endorsed by FIFA. "FIFA", "World Cup", team names and related trademarks belong to their respective owners.
footer.copyright: © {year} World Cup Pick'em — an independent fan project for entertainment purposes only.

howItWorks.title: How it works
howItWorks.intro: Pick'ems is the ultimate FIFA World Cup 2026 prediction game. Compete with friends by predicting match scores, group standings, and the bracket.

createAccount.title: Create an account
createAccount.body: Sign up with email or social login. Takes less than a minute.

globalPredictions.title: Make global predictions
globalPredictions.body: Predict group orders, best third-place teams, and the full knockout bracket before kickoff.

matchScores.title: Predict match scores
matchScores.body: Set exact scores for each match before it begins. Locks at kickoff.

joinBoard.title: Join or create a board
joinBoard.body: Invite friends with an 8-char code or link. Join as many boards as you like.

earnPoints.title: Earn points
earnPoints.body: Points are awarded automatically based on prediction accuracy.

global.title: Tournament predictions
global.body: Set once before kickoff. Group orders, third-place, and bracket.

match.title: Per-match predictions
match.body: Predict exact scorelines for every match. Locks at kickoff.

awards.title: Top performers
awards.body: Pick the Golden Boot, Golden Ball, and tournament awards before the cup begins.

boards.title: Private groups
boards.body: Create or join private groups. Owners share an 8-char invite code; you can be in as many boards as you want.

competitions.title: Scoring contests
competitions.body: Each board can run multiple competitions — separate leaderboards per phase or game type. Everyone on the board competes.

leaderboards.heading: Leaderboards
leaderboards.body: Every competition has its own live leaderboard. Join multiple boards to compete in parallel — your scores update automatically as matches resolve.

rules.title: Rules & scoring
rules.intro: Points are awarded based on prediction accuracy. Exact scores earn the most, and bracket points scale with each knockout round.

outcome.label: Correct outcome
outcome.description: Got the winner right, not the exact score

exactPosition.label: Exact position
exactPosition.description: Correct finish (1st, 2nd, 3rd, or 4th) in a group

incorrect.label: Incorrect
incorrect.description: Wrong position and not among the top 2

bestThird.label: Best third-place
bestThird.description: Per correct team in the 8 best-thirds list

picksLock.title: Pick locks
picksLock.body: Match-score picks lock at each match's kickoff. Global pick'em locks when the first match of the tournament starts.

keepEditing.title: You can keep editing
keepEditing.body: Picks stay editable until they lock. Update them anytime before then — only the latest version counts.

fullTime.title: Regulation time scores
fullTime.body: Points use the 90-minute result. Extra time and penalty winners count for bracket picks only — a 1-1 game that ends in penalties still scores 1-1 for match-score picks.

faq.title: FAQ
faq.body: Answers to the most common questions about the 2026 World Cup Pick'em are on the way.

privacy.title: Privacy policy
privacy.intro: This policy describes how Pick'ems collects, uses, and protects your personal information.

account.label: Account info
account.body: display name, email, and authentication credentials when you sign up.

usage.label: Usage data
usage.body: predictions, pages visited, and feature usage — used to improve the service.

device.label: Device info
device.body: browser type, OS, and screen resolution for analytics.

items.display: Display your profile to board members

sharing.title: Sharing
sharing.body: Your name, predictions, and scores are visible to members of the boards you've joined. We don't sell your data. Anonymized aggregate data may be used for analytics.

storage.title: Storage & security
storage.body: Account data is stored on managed cloud infrastructure. We use industry-standard encryption in transit and at rest, but no system is completely secure.

yourRights.title: Your rights
yourRights.body: You can request to access, export, or delete your account data at any time through your account settings or by contacting support.

cookies.title: Cookies
cookies.body: We use essential cookies for authentication and session management, plus minimal analytics cookies to understand usage patterns.

contact.title: Contact
contact.body: For privacy questions or data requests, use the contact links in the footer.

terms.title: Terms of service
terms.intro: By using Pick'ems, you agree to these terms. If you don't agree, please don't use the platform.

about.title: About
about.body: Pick'ems is a free, fan-made prediction game for the FIFA World Cup 2026. No affiliation with FIFA. For entertainment only — no real-money wagering.

usage.title: Open to all
usage.body: Pick'ems is open to anyone. By signing up, you accept these terms and use the platform at your own responsibility.

items.noMultiple: No multiple accounts for unfair advantage
items.suspend: We can suspend accounts that violate these terms

predictions.title: Predictions
predictions.body: All predictions are final once locked. Scoring rules are on the Rules page and may be adjusted by board admins.

conduct.title: Conduct
conduct.body: Don't abuse, harass, or impersonate other users. Don't attempt to manipulate scoring, leaderboards, or system data.

ip.title: Intellectual property
ip.body: Team names, tournament names, and related trademarks belong to their respective owners. The platform's code and design are owned by the project maintainers.

disclaimers.title: Disclaimers
disclaimers.body: The service is provided "as is" without warranties. We're not responsible for prediction outcomes, downtime, or data loss caused by external factors.

changes.title: Changes
changes.body: We may update these terms; significant changes will be announced on the platform.

bracket.title: Bracket
bracket.body: The interactive knockout bracket for predicting every round is on the way.
